zh.Diddlebury, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾迪德萊波利
zh.Diddlebury, Shropshire, , England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾迪德萊波利
zh.Woodford, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mason II於1488年出生在英國史洛普爾迪德萊波利時，他的父親Richard Barnes Mason34歲，母親Margareta Higgins30歲。他於1513年與Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler在英國史洛普爾阿爾波波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1540年6月4日在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mason II于1488年出生在英国史洛普爾迪德萊波利时，他的父亲Richard Barnes Mason34岁，母亲Margareta Higgins30岁。他于1513年与Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler在英国史洛普爾阿爾波波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1540年6月4日在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Masson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Lucien, Alain, Henri, Pierre, Yves, Agathe, Aime, Cecile, Clovis, Francois, Francoise.

variants.name: Machin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Juan, Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Blanca, Diego, Luis, Ramon.
English: variant of   Machen  . This is the more common form of the name in Britain and Ireland.
Spanish (Machín): probably a nickname from machín ‘boor, lout’, often applied to a blacksmith's apprentice.

variants.name: Macon
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Machen
meanings: English: variant of Mason , from the Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mason II was born in 1488, in Diddlebury, Shropshire, England, his father, Richard Barnes Mason, was 34 and his mother, Margareta Higgins, was 30. He married Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler in 1513, in Alberbury, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 4 June 1540, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mason II est né en 1488, à Diddlebury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Barnes Mason, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margareta Higgins, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler en 1513, à Alberbury, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mason II 1488 in Diddlebury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Barnes Mason 34 und seine Mutter Margareta Higgins 30. Er hat 1513 in Alberbury, Shropshire, England Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 4. Juni 1540 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mason II è nato il nel 1488 nel Diddlebury, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Barnes Mason, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margareta Higgins, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler nel 1513, nel Alberbury, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 4 giugno 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Mason IIが1488年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアディッドレブリーで生まれた時，父Richard Barnes Masonは34歳，母Margareta Higginsは30歳であった。1513年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルバーブリーでAnne FitzWarren Buttler Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1540年6月4日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mason II(이)가 1488년 영국 슈럽실르 디들레버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Barnes Mason(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margareta Higgins(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1513년 영국 슈럽실르 알버버이에서 Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1540년 6월 4일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mason II nasceu em 1488, em Diddlebury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Barnes Mason, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margareta Higgins, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler em 1513, em Alberbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mason II родился в 1488 г. в местности диддлебури, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Barnes Mason было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margareta Higgins, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler в 1513 г. в местности альбирбури, шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 4 июня 1540 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mason II nació en 1488, en Diddlebury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Barnes Mason, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margareta Higgins, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anne FitzWarren Buttler Butler en 1513, en Alberbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 4 de junio de 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
